languages.text: {n}Ваше внимание привлекает Батошски и его нож, покрытый чем-то зеленоватым. Пока вы отвечали Дунавски, полковник успел обмакнуть лезвие в яд.{/n}
{n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваше внимание привлекает Батошски и его нож, покрытый чем-то зеленоватым. Пока вы отвечали Дунавски, полковник успел обмакнуть лезвие в яд.{/n}

{n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的目光捕捉到巴托什斯基匕首上的反光，上面涂了层绿色的东西。就在你回应杜纳芙斯卡时，上校趁机在刀刃上涂了毒。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的目光捕捉到巴托什斯基匕首上的反光，上面涂了层绿色的东西。就在你回应杜纳芙斯卡时，上校趁机在刀刃上涂了毒。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gözün, Batoshski'nin bıçağının yeşilimsi bir şeyle kaplı parıltısına takılıyor. Albay, Dunawski'ye cevap verirken harcadığın anı bıçağını zehirlemek için kullanmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Gözün, Batoshski'nin bıçağının yeşilimsi bir şeyle kaplı parıltısına takılıyor. Albay, Dunawski'ye cevap verirken harcadığın anı bıçağını zehirlemek için kullanmış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre regard s'arrête brièvement sur le tranchant de la lame de Batoshski, enduit d'une substance verdâtre. Le colonel a profité de votre réponse à Dunawski pour enduire son couteau de poison.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre regard s'arrête brièvement sur le tranchant de la lame de Batoshski, enduit d'une substance verdâtre. Le colonel a profité de votre réponse à Dunawski pour enduire son couteau de poison.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus ojos captan el destello del cuchillo de Batoshski, cubierto de algo verdoso. El coronel ha aprovechado el momento que has dedicado a responder a Dunawski para cubrir su filo de veneno.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus ojos captan el destello del cuchillo de Batoshski, cubierto de algo verdoso. El coronel ha aprovechado el momento que has dedicado a responder a Dunawski para cubrir su filo de veneno.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dein Blick fällt auf Batoshskis mit einer grünen Schicht überzogenes Messer. Der Colonel hat den Moment, in dem du Dunawski geantwortet hast, genutzt, um sein Messer in Gift zu tauchen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dein Blick fällt auf Batoshskis mit einer grünen Schicht überzogenes Messer. Der Colonel hat den Moment, in dem du Dunawski geantwortet hast, genutzt, um sein Messer in Gift zu tauchen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシフスキーの刀が緑色の何かで覆われているのが目に留まる。あなたはダウンスキーに答えるのに数秒間気を取られていた間に、彼は毒を刀に塗ったのだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your eyes catch the glint of Batoshski's knife, coated in something greenish. The colonel has used the moment you spent answering Dunawski to coat his knife in poison.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}バトシフスキーの刀が緑色の何かで覆われているのが目に留まる。あなたはダウンスキーに答えるのに数秒間気を取られていた間に、彼は毒を刀に塗ったのだ。{/n}
